description: M4 audit finding F2 (issue #441): the field of a statically-known struct-constructor result is checked at check() time. After `struct point [ x y ]`, reading `.z` off `(point 0 0)` — whose type the checker knows exactly — raises `ol-unknown-field` (stage semantic), reporting the same `{ type, field }` and message the runtime does one stage earlier (`spec/tooling.md:193` — a tool SHOULD report a statically-knowable use of an otherwise-runtime code; `spec/error-model.md:126`). The span points at the `.z` field segment, matching the runtime's own span.

diagnostics.message: point has no field z. check the spelling.
